name: Breaking the Ice
overview: US Figure Skating Champion Rory Flack is on a groundbreaking journey to coach the first all-diverse competitive synchronized skating team. The team of 10 middle and high school girls is up for a challenge with rigorous training on and off the ice; managing team dynamics; outspoken parents and skating rivals. Will the team navigate the inherent danger of the ice and avoid injury? On their way to Nationals, Team DMV is defying the odds, breaking barriers and ultimately, Breaking The Ice!i
